name: Penne con Salscia e Ricotta

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus one can of water

method: In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil and sausage links cut into four pieces, fry until sausage is cooked. In the same frying pan, saute garlic, add tomatoes, torn basil leaves, water, salt, and pepper, and simmer on low for 20 minutes. Remember to remove the crushed garlic after simmering.

Boil a pot of salted water, add penne pasta and cook to al dente, transfer pasta to sauce, add a ladle or two of pasta water, and manticare. Garnish penne with 1 T of ricotta cheese sprinkled with red pepper flakes as pictured below.
Always taste your food to see if you need more salt and pepper. Garnish with a basil leaf. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
